lesson.menu_desc: Giving a clear project update on a call -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 3 -- Status Updates & Ongoing Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Patrícia Xavier Lima Iwashita | Aula 3 -- Status Updates & Ongoing Work

listenings.text: Hi Patrícia, this is David with a quick update on the Acme project. Right now, the team is migrating the last set of data, and we are on track for Friday. We have reached our first milestone: the test environment is live. There is still one pending item. We are waiting for their security approval, but it is not a blocker yet. Our main priority this week is user training. I am preparing the sessions now, and I will follow up with you tomorrow. Talk soon.

Hi Patrícia, this is Priya from the integration team. I wanted to share a quick progress update before our sync. At the moment, we are testing the new connection, and everything is going well. We are a little behind on the timeline, but the work is still ongoing and nothing is blocked. I am currently writing the documentation, and I will send it to you by the end of the day. Let us follow up on the open items in our next call. Thank you.
